Title: Senior Dataiku / Agentic AI Automation Specialist
Description:
Hexa Consulting is looking for a Senior Dataiku / Agentic AI Automation Specialist to join our Client’s team in a hybrid work model from Porto.




At Hexa Consulting, we are more than just an IT consulting company — we are a space where technological talent grows. Based in Portugal, we value transparency and a people-first approach, helping professionals take the next big step in their IT careers. Our mission is to build strong relationships and support the development of every team member. With projects in Nearshore, Time & Material, Service Management, and Tech Academies, you will find opportunities to learn, innovate, and grow in your career.




Job Details

Porto, Portugal | Hybrid, 40% Office / 60% Home Office




Mandatory Requirements

Senior profile with 7+ years of professional experience
Fluent English, minimum B2 level
Strong experience with Dataiku
Dataiku Developer or Advanced Developer Certification is a high advantage
Experience in data pipeline development
Experience with workflow automation and data process orchestration
Experience integrating solutions with APIs and external systems
Strong knowledge of Generative AI and LLM-based solutions
Experience with Dataiku LLM Mesh
Experience developing or integrating AI Agents
Knowledge of prompt engineering, context management, instruction design and constraint management
Experience integrating LLMs into automated workflows
Strong Python development skills
Experience with REST APIs
Knowledge of Git, CI/CD, DevOps practices and deployment automation
Strong understanding of software engineering best practices
Experience with at least one cloud platform: AWS, Azure or GCP
Experience working in Agile environments
Ability to create technical documentation and contribute to solution design




Technology Stack

Dataiku | Dataiku LLM Mesh | AI Agents | Python | REST APIs | Git | CI/CD | DevOps | AWS | Azure | GCP




Key Responsibilities

Design intelligent automation solutions using the Dataiku platform
Define automation architectures combining data pipelines, workflow orchestration, application system integration and AI Agents
Integrate language models through Dataiku LLM Mesh
Develop AI agents capable of executing or supporting tasks within automated processes
Build orchestration logic between AI Agents, data pipelines and application systems
Build and maintain automated pipelines and workflows in Dataiku
Integrate automation solutions with existing systems through APIs and services
Apply industrialization best practices, including code versioning, monitoring, deployment automation and workflow governance
Collaborate closely with IT teams responsible for the systems involved in automated processes
Define integration mechanisms with existing applications
Contribute to technical integration standards and development best practices
Support the evolution of Smart Automation and Agentic AI capabilities
Mentor more junior technical profiles and promote best practices in automation and LLM usage




Annual Compensation Range: €40,000 – €60,000, depending on experience and qualifications.




What We Offer

Work Model: Hybrid, 40% Office / 60% Home Office
Contract Type: Permanent / Employment or B2B, depending on your preference
Health Insurance: Comprehensive coverage for your well-being
Continuous Learning: Access to Udemy Business with thousands of courses and workshops
Collaborative environment with highly skilled professionals
Career growth and leadership development opportunities
Participation in large-scale international transformation programs




If you meet the above criteria and are ready for an exciting opportunity in a dynamic environment, please send your CV!

Based in Portugal, we value transparency and a people-first approach, helping professionals take the next big step in their IT careers. Our mission is to build strong relationships and support the development of every team member. With projects in Nearshore, Time & Material, Service Management, and Tech Academies, you will find opportunities to learn, innovate, and grow in your career.


Job Details

Porto, Portugal | Hybrid, 40% Office / 60% Home Office


Mandatory Requirements

  • Senior profile with 7+ years of professional experience
  • Fluent English, minimum B2 level
  • Strong experience with Dataiku
  • Dataiku Developer or Advanced Developer Certification is a high advantage
  • Experience in data pipeline development
  • Experience with workflow automation and data process orchestration
  • Experience integrating solutions with APIs and external systems
  • Strong knowledge of Generative AI and LLM-based solutions
  • Experience with Dataiku LLM Mesh
  • Experience developing or integrating AI Agents
  • Knowledge of prompt engineering, context management, instruction design and constraint management
  • Experience integrating LLMs into automated workflows
  • Strong Python development skills
  • Experience with REST APIs
  • Knowledge of Git, CI/CD, DevOps practices and deployment automation
  • Strong understanding of software engineering best practices
  • Experience with at least one cloud platform: AWS, Azure or GCP
  • Experience working in Agile environments
  • Ability to create technical documentation and contribute to solution design


Technology Stack

Dataiku | Dataiku LLM Mesh | AI Agents | Python | REST APIs | Git | CI/CD | DevOps | AWS | Azure | GCP


Key Responsibilities

  • Design intelligent automation solutions using the Dataiku platform
  • Define automation architectures combining data pipelines, workflow orchestration, application system integration and AI Agents
  • Integrate language models through Dataiku LLM Mesh
  • Develop AI agents capable of executing or supporting tasks within automated processes
  • Build orchestration logic between AI Agents, data pipelines and application systems
  • Build and maintain automated pipelines and workflows in Dataiku
  • Integrate automation solutions with existing systems through APIs and services
  • Apply industrialization best practices, including code versioning, monitoring, deployment automation and workflow governance
  • Collaborate closely with IT teams responsible for the systems involved in automated processes
  • Define integration mechanisms with existing applications
  • Contribute to technical integration standards and development best practices
  • Support the evolution of Smart Automation and Agentic AI capabilities
  • Mentor more junior technical profiles and promote best practices in automation and LLM usage


Annual Compensation Range: €40,000 – €60,000, depending on experience and qualifications.


What We Offer

  • Work Model: Hybrid, 40% Office / 60% Home Office
  • Contract Type: Permanent / Employment or B2B, depending on your preference
  • Health Insurance: Comprehensive coverage for your well-being
  • Continuous Learning: Access to Udemy Business with thousands of courses and workshops
  • Collaborative environment with highly skilled professionals
  • Career growth and leadership development opportunities
  • Participation in large-scale international transformation programs


If you meet the above criteria and are ready for an exciting opportunity in a dynamic environment, please send your CV!

Title: Observability Engineer
Description:
Observability Engineer

📍 Porto e Lisboa (Híbrido)

🏢 wBrain

🌍 National & International Technology Projects




About wBrain

Na wBrain ajudamos organizações a garantir a fiabilidade, disponibilidade e performance dos seus sistemas através da implementação de soluções modernas de observabilidade e monitorização.

Estamos à procura de um Observability Engineer para integrar projetos nacionais e internacionais, contribuindo para a evolução contínua das capacidades de monitorização, análise de performance e gestão proativa de ambientes complexos.




Missão

Desenhar, implementar e otimizar soluções de observabilidade que permitam monitorizar infraestruturas, aplicações e ambientes cloud, garantindo elevada disponibilidade, rápida deteção de problemas e melhoria contínua da experiência dos utilizadores.




Principais Responsabilidades

📊 Observability & Monitoring

Implementar e evoluir plataformas de observabilidade e monitorização empresarial
Definir e otimizar estratégias de monitorização para infraestruturas, aplicações e sistemas distribuídos
Garantir cobertura completa de métricas, logs, traces e eventos operacionais
Desenvolver dashboards, alertas e mecanismos de análise proativa

🔍 Application Performance Monitoring (APM)

Implementar e gerir soluções de APM
Identificar e resolver problemas de performance aplicacional
Analisar comportamentos anómalos e apoiar equipas de desenvolvimento e operações
Contribuir para a melhoria da experiência dos utilizadores finais

☁️ Cloud Observability

Implementar práticas de observabilidade em ambientes cloud
Trabalhar com arquiteturas distribuídas em AWS, Azure ou Google Cloud Platform
Garantir visibilidade end-to-end dos workloads cloud

🚨 Monitoring Strategy & Reliability

Definir estratégias de:
Metrics Monitoring
Log Management
Distributed Tracing
Alerting
Real User Monitoring (RUM)
Synthetic Monitoring
Apoiar iniciativas de melhoria contínua da fiabilidade dos sistemas

🤝 Collaboration

Trabalhar em conjunto com equipas de:
DevOps
Cloud
Infraestrutura
Desenvolvimento
SRE
Apoiar processos de troubleshooting e análise de incidentes




Requisitos Técnicos

3+ anos de experiência em Observability, Monitoring ou áreas similares
Experiência comprovada em implementação e operação de plataformas de observabilidade
Conhecimentos sólidos em:
Metrics
Logs
Traces
Alerting
APM
RUM
Synthetic Monitoring
Experiência com uma ou mais das seguintes ferramentas:
Dynatrace
Datadog
New Relic
Prometheus
Grafana
Plataformas equivalentes
Conhecimentos de ambientes cloud:
AWS
Azure
Google Cloud Platform
Inglês profissional (obrigatório)




Valorizado

Certificações em plataformas de observabilidade ou monitorização
Experiência em ambientes enterprise de elevada criticidade
Conhecimentos de SRE e Reliability Engineering
Experiência em sistemas distribuídos e arquiteturas cloud-native




Soft Skills

Forte capacidade analítica
Excelente capacidade de resolução de problemas
Espírito de equipa
Boa comunicação e relacionamento interpessoal
Capacidade de adaptação a ambientes dinâmicos
Sentido de responsabilidade e ownership




Modelo de Trabalho

📍 Porto (Híbrido)

🏢 Regime híbrido

🌍 Projetos nacionais e internacionais




📩 Candidaturas

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Hiire is supporting the search for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer.




This is an opportunity to join an early-stage, product-driven company where AI sits at the core of the platform. You’ll work closely with the founding team and play a key role in shaping the architecture, direction, and evolution of the company’s machine learning capabilities from the ground up.

The team is looking for someone who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, experimenting with modern AI approaches, and building scalable, production-ready systems that deliver real value to users.

As part of a fast-moving startup environment, you’ll have significant ownership, contribute to technical decision-making, and help define engineering and AI best practices as the platform continues to scale.




What You’ll Be Working On
Designing and developing AI/ML capabilities that power core platform functionality
Building and deploying machine learning systems end-to-end, from experimentation to production
Working on problems related to:
Natural Language Processing (NLP)
Intelligent document processing
Semantic search and matching
Information extraction and classification
Web data parsing and enrichment
Experimenting with modern AI techniques, LLMs, and agent-based workflows to improve product capabilities
Training, evaluating, and optimizing models with a focus on scalability, performance, and reliability
Collaborating closely with engineers, product stakeholders, and founders to iterate quickly and deliver impactful solutions
Contributing to AI development standards, tooling, testing practices, and internal processes
Helping balance innovation with pragmatic engineering decisions in a fast-paced environment




What They’re Looking For
at least 3+ years of experience working as a Machine Learning Engineer or AI Engineer in product-focused environments
Strong Python development experience in production systems
Hands-on experience building AI-driven solutions using:
LLMs
Prompt engineering
Fine-tuning techniques
Conversational AI
Multi-agent systems/frameworks
Solid understanding of modern machine learning and NLP concepts
Experience deploying and maintaining ML systems in production environments
Strong problem-solving mindset with the ability to work independently and take ownership
Comfortable operating in ambiguous, fast-changing startup environments
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, AI, or a related field
Strong communication and collaboration skills




Why This Opportunity?
High ownership and direct impact on product and technical direction
Opportunity to shape the AI architecture and engineering culture early on
Work alongside experienced founders and high-performing engineers
Fast iteration cycles and exposure to cutting-edge AI technologies
Product-centric environment where engineering work directly influences user value
Strong focus on innovation, experimentation, and continuous improvement

Title: ML Ops Engineer - Digital Solutions
HTML:
Company Description

Continental is a leading tire manufacturer and industry specialist that develops and produces sustainable, safe and convenient solutions for automotive manufacturers as well as industrial and end customers worldwide. Founded in 1871, the company generated sales of €19.7 billion in 2025 and currently employs around 78,000 people in 54 countries and markets.

Job Description

In Digital Solutions, we drive innovation for connected mobility and deliver cutting-edge digital products to our global fleet customers. As a ML Ops Engineer, you will be at the forefront of transforming machine learning into scalable, production-ready solutions.

You will design, deploy and maintain robust ML pipelines, ensuring seamless integration of models into production environments and optimizing their performance at scale. Working closely with Data Scientists, Data Engineers and cross-functional teams, you will enable AI-driven insights that power smarter, safer and more efficient mobility worldwide.

Key responsibilities:

  • Design and manage CI/CD pipelines for ML models from development to production;
  • Build and maintain scalable ML infrastructure on cloud platforms using infrastructure-as-code;
  • Automate deployment, monitoring, and rollback processes for reliability and reproducibility;
  • Implement monitoring and feedback loops for model performance and continuous improvement;
  • Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to integrate ML models and standardize workflows.

Qualifications

  • Academic degree in Science, Engineering, Mathematics or any related field;
  • 2+ years of working experience as a ML Ops Engineer;
  • Strong programming skills in Python and SQL;
  • Practical knowledge in CI/CD and automation tools (e.g., GitHub Actions);
  • Proficiency in containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes);
  • Hands-on experience with ML model deployment and lifecycle management (MLflow, SageMaker);
  • Good knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS or Azure) and infrastructure-as-code practices;
  • Familiarity with monitoring and performance tracking tools (Grafana) and workflow orchestration (Airflow);
  • Solid understanding of software engineering and DevOps practices (testing, GitOps, CI/CD design patterns);
  • Experience with Agile project management methods (Scrum, Kanban);
  • Reliable team player with structured self-organized workstyle;
  • Proficient English language skills (written and spoken).

Additional Information

Our offer:

  • Integration in a challenging and international work environment;
  • Flexible working model;
  • Agile and collaborative working style;
  • Continuous opportunities for personal development and learning.

We are committed to fostering a workplace where everyone feels safe, respected, and valued. All kind of applications are welcome.

Ready to drive with Continental? Take the first step and fill in the online application.

Title: QA Engineer
Description:
Blip is a leading tech company focused on software engineering solutions for sports entertainment.

We operate at scale. As part of Flutter Entertainment, we play an essential role in the Group's goal of becoming the global leader in online sports betting and iGaming, developing innovative products and platforms for over 14 million monthly customers worldwide.

We are serious about Tech. We are problem-solvers with big ambitions, keeping a people-first mindset at the core of our work. We prioritize flexibility as we strive to deliver the best technological products and tackle the greatest industry challenges.

Recognizing that everyone brings their own strengths, backgrounds and new perspectives, we empower you to be yourself. That uniqueness shapes the culture of belonging we are so proud of.

The Role

Currently, we are looking for Quality Assurance Engineers (Backend) and we BET you have what it takes, to join us! Reporting to an Engineering Manager in a team formed by 5 Developers and 1 QA, you will be using cutting-edge technologies to deliver amazing value to our customers, while scaling our platform to meet the demands of worldwide markets.

What You’ll Be Doing

Be focused on improving our ability to test efficiently and enhancing the product and customer experience. You'll have a decisive role in the automation strategy of your team and project, so you must have a proven track record of software testing for fast-paced organizations where time to market, quality, and rapid change are critical to the company's success.

What You’ll Bring


Proven track record as an effective Quality Engineer in complex software development projects
Demonstrable experience in both manual and automated testing methods
You can write/maintain test automation and test scripts
You have a working knowledge of a development language such as Java, Python or C#
Demonstrable experience testing in service-oriented architectures and understanding data flow through such systems
You can take on complex technical concepts and information relatively quickly in most contexts, and provide immediate advice on effective courses of action.
You can demonstrate/illustrate an understanding of solution architecture including system design, data design, and data flow.
Experience in testing at API layers (e.g. REST)
Test-driven development techniques (e.g. BDD and ATDD)
Experience working with version control systems such as Git
Comfortable with Linux navigation and script automation using shell
Understanding of build and configuration tools such as Jenkins, Puppet, CHEF, and Ansible.
Proven clear and confident communication skills.


This is what you should have. What do we have, you ask? Well...you can check our amazing perks & benefits right here!  So ... are you in?

Equal opportunities

At Blip, we are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We strongly encourage people from all backgrounds, ways of thinking and working to apply. We are committed to including everyone regardless of their race, disability, age, gender identity, sexual orientation, and religion.

Everyone brings different perspectives and experiences; you don’t have to meet all the requirements listed to apply for this role.

If you need any adjustments to apply for the position and to ensure this role aligns with your needs, please send an email to accommodations@blip.pt.

We will only respond to inquiries related to disabilities.

Title: Junior Consultant
Description:
Company Description Lean 6 Sigma Consultores provides high-quality consulting services delivered by experienced international consultants. The firm offers tailored guidance and methodologies designed to address the specific needs of each client organization. Its approach is based on Lean and Six Sigma principles to improve processes, increase efficiency, and reduce waste. Team members collaborate closely with clients to implement sustainable improvements and support continuous development. This environment offers early-career professionals the opportunity to learn from seasoned experts and contribute to impactful projects.

Role Description As a Junior Consultant at Lean 6 Sigma Consultores, you will support senior consultants in analyzing client processes, gathering and interpreting data, mapping workflows, and identifying opportunities for improvement. On a day-to-day basis, you will support in the design and implementation of Lean and Six Sigma initiatives. You will also contribute to documenting project progress, tracking key performance indicators, and ensuring that agreed actions are followed through. The role involves continuous learning, including on-the-job training in Lean, Six Sigma, and project management methodologies.

Qualifications

Foundational knowledge or strong interest in process improvement, Lean, and/or Six Sigma methodologies.
Analytical and problem-solving skills, including the ability to work with data, identify patterns, and draw meaningful conclusions.
Strong communication and presentation abilities, with clear written and spoken English; Portuguese proficiency is an advantage.
Team-oriented mindset, with the ability to collaborate, take feedback, and contribute to a supportive project environment.
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Management, Economics, Business, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
Attention to detail, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.
Willingness to learn, curiosity about operational excellence, and openness to working directly at client sites when needed.
Familiarity with Excel, PowerPoint, and other productivity tools; experience with data analysis or visualization tools is a plus.

Title: (Senior) ML Ops Engineer
HTML:
Company Description

Continental is a leading tire manufacturer and industry specialist. Founded in 1871, the company generated sales of €39.7 billion in 2024 and currently employs around 95,000 people in 54 countries and markets.

Tire solutions from the Tires group sector make mobility safer, smarter, and more sustainable. Its premium portfolio encompasses car, truck, bus, two-wheel, and specialty tires as well as smart solutions and services for fleets and tire retailers. Continental has been delivering top performance for more than 150 years and is one of the world’s largest tire manufacturers. In fiscal 2024, the Tires group sector generated sales of 13.9 billion euros. Continental's tire division employs more than 57,000 people worldwide and has 20 production and 16 development sites.

Job Description

Join Continental’s Digital Solutions Department as a MLOps Engineer

In Digital Solutions, we drive innovation for connected mobility and deliver cutting-edge digital products to our global fleet customers. As a MLOps Engineer, you will be at the forefront of transforming machine learning into scalable, production-ready solutions.

You will design, deploy, and maintain robust ML pipelines, ensuring seamless integration of models into production environments and optimizing their performance at scale. Working closely with Data Scientists, Data Engineers, and cross-functional teams, you will enable AI-driven insights that power smarter, safer, and more efficient mobility worldwide.

Main responsibilities:

  • Design and manage CI/CD pipelines for ML models from development to production;
  • Build and maintain scalable ML infrastructure on cloud platforms using infrastructure-as-code;
  • Automate deployment, monitoring, and rollback processes for reliability and reproducibility;
  • Implement monitoring and feedback loops for model performance and continuous improvement;
  • Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to integrate ML models and standardize workflows;
  • Provide technical leadership and mentorship, fostering knowledge sharing and best practices.

Qualifications

  • Academic degree in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field;
  • >3 years of professional experience as a MLOps Engineer;
  • Strong programming skills in Python and SQL;
  • Expertise in CI/CD and automation tools (e.g., GitHub Actions);
  • Proficiency in containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes);
  • Hands-on experience with ML model deployment and lifecycle management (MLflow, SageMaker);
  • Good knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS or Azure) and infrastructure-as-code practices;
  • Familiarity with monitoring and performance tracking tools (Grafana) and workflow orchestration (Airflow);
  • Solid understanding of software engineering and DevOps practices (testing, GitOps, CI/CD design patterns);
  • Experience with Agile project management methods (Scrum, Kanban);
  • Experience working in an international team (desirable);
  • Proficient English language skills (spoken / written).

Additional Information

Our offer:

  • Integration in a challenging and international work environment;
  • Flexible working model;
  • Agile and collaborative working style;
  • Continuous opportunities for personal development and learning.

We are committed to fostering a workplace where everyone feels safe, respected, and valued. All kind of applications are welcome.

Title: AI Engineering Lead
Description:
About Planet

Planet is a global provider of integrated technology and payments solutions for retail and hospitality customers.

We create great experiences for the millions of people who use our payments, software, and tax-free solutions every minute of every day.

Planet empowers its customers to deliver great customer experiences by combining payments and software in ways that drive greater loyalty, increase revenue and save time.

Founded over 35 years ago and with our headquarters in London, today we have more than 2,500 employees located across six continents serving our customers in more than 120 markets.

Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior Engineering & AI Tech Lead to provide hands‑on technical leadership for our on‑premise hospitality products, while systematically infusing AI into both the product roadmap and the day‑to‑day ways of working of the engineering team.

The successful candidate will be equally comfortable owning complex C# / C++ systems, modernising legacy platforms, and pragmatically applying AI (LLMs, ML, automation) where it creates real customer or operational value — not experimentation for experimentation’s sake.

This is a hands‑on role: you will design, code, review, coach, and lead by example while steadily raising the technical and delivery bar of the team.

What You Will Do

Technical & Product Leadership


Act as the technical authority for the on‑prem product suite, spanning legacy and modern components
Drive architecture, design decisions, and technical standards across C# and C++ codebases
Own the technical execution of the product roadmap, ensuring delivery predictability, quality, and sustainability
Partner closely with Product leadership to translate business goals into executable technical plans
Identify and reduce systemic technical debt and operational risk


AI Enablement & Adoption


Identify high‑leverage AI opportunities across the product: automation, supportability, configuration, data quality, compliance, and operational efficiency
Lead the pragmatic adoption of AI / LLM‑based capabilities in production environments
Define standards for AI quality, testing, observability, security, and responsible use
Introduce AI‑assisted ways of working for the engineering team (e.g. development productivity, testing, diagnostics, documentation)
Ensure AI is embedded into normal delivery workflows, not treated as a standalone initiative


Delivery Ownership


Take end‑to‑end accountability for delivery outcomes, including prioritisation, execution, and risk management
Establish and track engineering KPIs (predictability, quality, operational health)
Ensure systems meet legal, fiscal, security, and regulatory requirements relevant to on‑prem hospitality software


Team Leadership & Enablement


Serve as a engineering team lead for the team as assigned
Lead through influence, coaching, and example rather than hierarchy
Mentor engineers; raise technical judgment and ownership across the team for AI
Shape common engineering practices: code reviews, testing strategies, CI/CD, documentation, incident handling
Gradually evolve team maturity, structure, and accountability as needed


Ways of Working & Operational Excellence


Drive continuous improvement in engineering practices, tooling, and workflows
Introduce clearer technical decision‑making, ownership boundaries, and escalation paths
Improve collaboration across Product, Support, Operations, and Compliance


Who You Are

Technical background


Strong professional experience in C# and C++ within complex commercial software products
Deep understanding of software architecture, distributed systems, and long‑lived codebases
Proven hands‑on experience delivering AI/ML or LLM‑based features into production
Comfortable modernising legacy systems while maintaining reliability for existing customers


Leadership & mindset


Experienced technical leader who can run a team without relying on title or hierarchy
Pragmatic, outcome‑oriented, and commercially aware
Strong coach and mentor; raises the bar for others through clarity and example
Confident making—and standing behind—technical decisions


Delivery & communication


Track record of delivering complex software predictably and safely
Able to communicate clearly with engineers, product managers, and senior stakeholders
Fluent English


Why Planet

Planet is an equal opportunity employer where diversity is valued, and all employment is decided based on qualifications, merit, and business need.

Come and grow your career in the most exciting, fast paced technology market, with a business that delivers feel-good connected commerce.

We would love to hear from you – Apply now.

At Planet, we embrace a hybrid work model, with three days a week in the office.

Reasonable accommodations may be made in order to allow for an individual to perform the essential functions of this role successfully.

Title: Platform Engineer (Analytics, Data & AI)
Description:
Want to know how a leading workplace experience and facility management company is powered by technology?

At ISS Tech Team, we create smarter workplace experiences through technology. Our Global Technology Solutions team builds digital solutions, from sensors and IoT devices to data, analytics and AI-driven capabilities, that support our ISS A/S operations across Cleaning, Workplace, Food and Technical Services.

With tech hubs in Copenhagen, Warsaw, and Porto, and teams collaborating across more than 30 countries, our ISS Tech team develops our digital solutions that have a real impact on both our customers and our people.

Location: Porto, Portugal or Warsaw, Poland

Work regime: Hybrid

The Job Role as Sr. Platform Engineer (Analytics, Data & AI):

We are seeking an experienced DevOps Engineer/IT Engineer with strong experience in Azure services to join our team. The ideal candidate will play an important role in managing, automating, and improving our cloud infrastructure, with a focus on function apps, storages and databricks on Azure. You will collaborate closely with the development and project teams from our Analytics, Data & AI area. These platforms have a global scale.

What You’ll Do


Design, implement, and maintain scalable and secure infrastructure in Microsoft Azure, including Azure Resource Manager (ARM), Virtual Networks, Subnets, Private Endpoints, Private DNS, Azure Storage, Azure Key Vault, Azure Event Grid, Azure Monitor, Diagnostic Settings, and Azure Container Instances.
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, including self‑hosted agents, artifact management, and automated pipeline execution.
Monitor and improve system health and performance using Prometheus, Grafana, Check_MK, Azure Monitor, and logging frameworks.
Define, implement, and maintain security controls aligned with ISS standards (RBAC, managed identities, service principals, NSGs, secure service-to-service communication).
Optimize infrastructure costs and performance using Azure Cost Management and related tooling.
Develop automation and integrations using Python scripts, REST APIs, and Azure SDKs.
Support Azure‑based data platform components, including Azure Databricks, Unity Catalog, Delta Live Tables (DLT), Databricks Workflows/Jobs, and data governance/permissions.
Troubleshoot complex issues across infrastructure, networking, CI/CD, and application layers.
Participate in Agile/Scrum processes and contribute to ongoing improvements within the team.


Key Qualifications

Must have:


Proven experience as a DevOps Engineer or a similar role focused on cloud infrastructure.
Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure, including architecture fundamentals (Subscriptions, Resource Groups, networking, compute, load balancers, security, monitoring).
Proficiency with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or GitOps tooling.
Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions.
English proficiency, both written and spoken.


Nice Have


Experience with monitoring, logging, and alerting tools (Azure Monitor, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack).
Strong scripting/automation skills (Python, Bash), including API integrations and Azure SDK usage.
Understanding of cost, security, and performance optimization in Azure environments.
Experience with Azure Databricks, Unity Catalog, DLT, and data governance.
Experience working in Agile/Scrum teams.


Personal Skills


Excellent analytical and problem‑solving abilities.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a cross‑functional environment.
Strong communication skills, including direct customer interaction experience.


What ISS Offers You


Permanent contract.
Competive package, including private Health Insurance.
22 days of annual leave per year +3 company leave days.
Flexible working hours & hybrid work model.
Continues training (Technical and behavioral development).
Modern, well-equipped office in the heart the city of Porto.
Free parking.
ISS Tech Team Communities.
Free access to company Gym.
Snacks and drinks at the office.


Why ISS

At ISS, we are more than just a service provider of cleaning, food, workplace and technical services, we are a partner in our customers’ success. By creating exceptional service moments and transforming workplaces into spaces where employees feel valued, engaged and productive, we enhance productivity and help our customers to attract talent and grow their businesses. This begins with our own people through training, career development, and a supportive culture – empowering them to deliver outstanding service. We know that when our people thrive, they create spaces where our customers’ employees and businesses thrive too.

ISS is a Place to Be You.

Be who you are. Become what you want. Be part of something bigger.

Become more. Become ISS.

ISS seeks to BE a place of belonging and CREATE places where every person is welcomed, embraced, and valued for exactly who they are. Places where people feel safe, respected, represented, and supported as their authentic selves.

Title: Technical Application Manager
Description:
Who is Volkswagen Financial Services?

It's been more than 70 years since Volkswagen Financial Services AG financed the first Volkswagen vehicles in Germany in 1949. A lot has changed since then, but our core goal hasn't; ensuring we meet the mobility needs of the people.

Volkswagen Financial Services today operates in 48 markets through its various subsidiaries, shareholdings, and joint ventures. Volkswagen Financial Services is the largest provider of automotive financial services worldwide.




What do we do?

Volkswagen Financial Services Porto is a VWFS IT hub, and the first outside Germany. Here we will establish a long-term Business & IT company of 150+ FTE. Our primary goal is to service all European markets in implementing and maintaining contract management systems. Our focus is on: Core systems, satellite systems (such as document management systems, collection systems) but also extends to integrations, data, and large project organizations. For this we seek a hands-on Platform Engineer.




Objectives:

As Technical Application Manager you have the technical responsibility for one or more of our core applications. This responsibility includes but is not limited to the stability, security, compliance and documentation of our IT Applications with the standards of our IT process house. As the first technical contact for our internal customers you are working closely with our technical experts, governance team and vendors to ensure the reliable delivery of all technical parts of the application. Proactive regular improvements are being implemented on application and process level to stay state-of-the-art in service delivery.




In this role, you will be responsible for:

Technical Application Management for one or more of our core applications
Main technical contact person for the internal customers of your application(s)
Evaluate new requirements towards your application together with customers and all involved expert teams
Maintain technical application documentation across the application lifecycle and contribute to the management of ISMS policies
Ensure the end2end optimization of the support processes for the applications (incident, problem, change, release)
Manage penetration tests, assessments and security findings fixes
Coordinate and align with Solution Architects on the implementation of security measures and other requirements
Align, track and review service levels, technical requirements and costs together with the markets, internal service providers and external vendors
Supporting internal and external audits
Contribute to company infrastructure and security assessments, including operational tasks automation
Participate in the security risk register, design, and work with other teams to implement action plans to mitigate risks where appropriate
Monitor logging and event systems, following up on alerts as appropriate.
Consult and align with the Project Managers about the rollout of the Software and ensure the necessary project support




We believe that the right profile for this job should have / be:

Bachelor or Master degree in informatics or comparable degree
Minimum of 3 years of experience in IT Service Delivery, Application Security or related areas
Knowledge on the controls from best practices frameworks, such as CobIT, ITIL, ISO IEC/IEC 27001, PS951 – Certification on these frameworks will be differential
Knowledge in web-based system architectures
Good communication skills, high level of self-responsibility, self-initiative and the ability to interact efficiently.
Experience in working in an international team/ project team
Results-oriented and with a team-player attitude
Strong analytical and structural competence and ability to organize him-/herself independently.
High degree of initiative, responsibility, assertiveness and willingness to travel
Speaks & writes English fluently




What we Offer:

Long-term contract
Competitive package including private health insurance, life insurance and meal allowance (pay by meal card)
Bonuses and benefits depending on performance
Schooling allowance and pension scheme
Incredible and unique annual company events
Opportunity to work on an international project and be part of multicultural and multidisciplinary team
Solid performance evaluation and career management methodologies
Continuous training – technical and behavioral development

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Basecone, a Wolters Kluwer Tax & Accounting Europe company, is a vibrant and dynamic place to work. We push boundaries and challenge each other every day. We collaborate across disciplines, trying to achieve that common goal: to develop, launch and maintain state-of-the-art Solutions. Solutions that effectively address real business problems and provide the best customer experience out there. Solutions that you and your team can be proud of at the end of the day.

At Basecone we believe our people are the heart and soul of our company. We value everyone’s input and believe in a commonly agreed commitment. We offer a no-nonsense environment, in which professionalism, fun and open communication are key elements.

We are looking for a passionate Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate is an experienced professional who combines data science expertise with strong MLOps capabilities and is not afraid to lead and mentor team members while driving business-focused solutions.

In this role, you will plan, design, develop and maintain high-performing data pipelines, machine learning services, and cloud infrastructure that power our ML-based products. You will work closely with Data Engineers and Data Scientists to promote the best experience for data analytics, data science explorations, development of data-based features, and ensure that ML projects run smoothly from experimentation to production.

Important Note: Our company operates a centralized GenAI platform for all GenAI-related use cases. As such, your research scope in GenAI will be focused on leveraging this existing platform rather than developing new GenAI solutions from scratch. Your primary focus will be on building robust ML infrastructure, deploying and monitoring traditional ML models, and ensuring seamless integration with our data ecosystem.

Responsibilities:


Plan, design, develop, and maintain scalable and high-performing data pipelines and ML infrastructure
Lead the development and deployment of machine learning services and APIs



Develop and maintain end-to-end (E2E) ML pipelines from data ingestion to model deployment


Implement and maintain code quality standards, data quality checks, and comprehensive testing frameworks
Work closely with Data Scientists to translate ML models into production-ready solutions
Lead the implementation of MLOps best practices, including CI/CD for ML models
Ensure smooth operation of ML projects and troubleshoot production issues
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions
Drive technical decisions and evaluate new technologies and software products
Work within our GenAI platform framework for all generative AI implementations
Push the team towards sprint goals in an Agile Scrum environment



Skills:

Required:


Degree in Computer Engineering, IT, or similar field
Minimum of 5 years of working experience as a Backend Engineer and/or Machine Learning Engineer
Strong ability to write robust, production-grade code in Python or similar languages
Proven experience with code quality, data quality, and testing frameworks
Experience developing end-to-end ML pipelines and workflows
Experience developing and deploying APIs for machine learning models
Proficiency with SQL/NoSQL databases
Experience with MLOps frameworks such as MLFlow, KubeFlow, or similar
Experience with AWS solutions, particularly SageMaker and other ML services
Strong understanding of ML model lifecycle management and deployment strategies
Knowledge of containerization and orchestration technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
Fluency in English: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English



Nice to have:


Experience with Computer Vision and NLP techniques
Familiarity with deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
Knowledge of data science frameworks like Scikit-Learn and Pandas
Experience with infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
Experience with asynchronous messaging
Understanding of monitoring and observability tools for ML systems



Competencies:


Leadership & Initiative: Ability to lead technical initiatives and drive projects to completion



What we offer:


Very competitive salary. We want to build a great team, and we want to get those who are the best at what they do.
Work with a perfect knowledge balanced team, across The Netherlands, Portugal and India.
Experience working for an international company, with a strong focus on the actual IT working methodologies and mentality.
A working environment where your team and manager understand that it’s important to spend time thinking on a solution, rather than rushing into the first one that comes to mind; an environment where refactoring and rebuilding are seen as sometimes necessary; an environment where the team is the one truly responsible for coming up with a solution, rather than implement one that was imposed.



Our Interview Practices

To maintain a fair and genuine hiring process, we kindly ask that all candidates participate in interviews without the assistance of AI tools or external prompts. Our interview process is designed to assess your individual skills, experiences, and communication style. We value authenticity and want to ensure we’re getting to know you—not a digital assistant. To help maintain this integrity, we ask to remove virtual backgrounds and include in-person interviews in our hiring process. Please note that use of AI-generated responses or third-party support during interviews will be grounds for disqualification from the recruitment process.

Applicants may be required to appear onsite at a Wolters Kluwer office as part of the recruitment process.

Basecone, a Wolters Kluwer Tax & Accounting Europe company, is a vibrant and dynamic place to work. We push boundaries and challenge each other every day. We collaborate across disciplines, trying to achieve that common goal: to develop, launch and maintain state-of-the-art Solutions. Solutions that effectively address real business problems and provide the best customer experience out there. Solutions that you and your team can be proud of at the end of the day.

At Basecone we believe our people are the heart and soul of our company. We value everyone’s input and believe in a commonly agreed commitment. We offer a no-nonsense environment, in which professionalism, fun and open communication are key elements.

We are looking for a passionate Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate is an experienced professional who combines data science expertise with strong MLOps capabilities and is not afraid to lead and mentor team members while driving business-focused solutions.

In this role, you will plan, design, develop and maintain high-performing data pipelines, machine learning services, and cloud infrastructure that power our ML-based products. You will work closely with Data Engineers and Data Scientists to promote the best experience for data analytics, data science explorations, development of data-based features, and ensure that ML projects run smoothly from experimentation to production.

Important Note: Our company operates a centralized GenAI platform for all GenAI-related use cases. As such, your research scope in GenAI will be focused on leveraging this existing platform rather than developing new GenAI solutions from scratch. Your primary focus will be on building robust ML infrastructure, deploying and monitoring traditional ML models, and ensuring seamless integration with our data ecosystem.

Responsibilities:

  • Plan, design, develop, and maintain scalable and high-performing data pipelines and ML infrastructure
  • Lead the development and deployment of machine learning services and APIs


Develop and maintain end-to-end (E2E) ML pipelines from data ingestion to model deployment

  • Implement and maintain code quality standards, data quality checks, and comprehensive testing frameworks
  • Work closely with Data Scientists to translate ML models into production-ready solutions
  • Lead the implementation of MLOps best practices, including CI/CD for ML models
  • Ensure smooth operation of ML projects and troubleshoot production issues
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions
  • Drive technical decisions and evaluate new technologies and software products
  • Work within our GenAI platform framework for all generative AI implementations
  • Push the team towards sprint goals in an Agile Scrum environment


Skills:

Required:

  • Degree in Computer Engineering, IT, or similar field
  • Minimum of 5 years of working experience as a Backend Engineer and/or Machine Learning Engineer
  • Strong ability to write robust, production-grade code in Python or similar languages
  • Proven experience with code quality, data quality, and testing frameworks
  • Experience developing end-to-end ML pipelines and workflows
  • Experience developing and deploying APIs for machine learning models
  • Proficiency with SQL/NoSQL databases
  • Experience with MLOps frameworks such as MLFlow, KubeFlow, or similar
  • Experience with AWS solutions, particularly SageMaker and other ML services
  • Strong understanding of ML model lifecycle management and deployment strategies
  • Knowledge of containerization and orchestration technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
  • Fluency in English: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English


Nice to have:

  • Experience with Computer Vision and NLP techniques
  • Familiarity with deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
  • Knowledge of data science frameworks like Scikit-Learn and Pandas
  • Experience with infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
  • Experience with asynchronous messaging
  • Understanding of monitoring and observability tools for ML systems


Competencies:

  • Leadership & Initiative: Ability to lead technical initiatives and drive projects to completion


What we offer:

  • Very competitive salary. We want to build a great team, and we want to get those who are the best at what they do.
  • Work with a perfect knowledge balanced team, across The Netherlands, Portugal and India.
  • Experience working for an international company, with a strong focus on the actual IT working methodologies and mentality.
  • A working environment where your team and manager understand that it’s important to spend time thinking on a solution, rather than rushing into the first one that comes to mind; an environment where refactoring and rebuilding are seen as sometimes necessary; an environment where the team is the one truly responsible for coming up with a solution, rather than implement one that was imposed.

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
TUI Group is the world’s number one integrated tourism business.

The Customer AI & Rapid Prototyping department stands at the forefront of digital transformation at TUI, driving company-wide AI adoption. Our team develops innovative AI solutions and personalized customer experiences that create measurable business value and give TUI a competitive edge in the travel industry. We combine data science, AI prototyping, and strategic implementation to deliver both rapid innovation and sustainable personalization solutions. In our dynamic work environment, we foster a culture of experimentation and data-driven decision-making, while working closely with various business units to shape the future of personalized travel experiences.

We are looking for a talented and dedicated Senior Machine Learning Engineer to help leverage AI and advanced analytics to better understand our customers, deliver personalized experiences, and drive business growth through data-driven decision-making

The team is responsible for features which drive customer engagement and conversion in TUI and Partner Channels. These include multi-agent chatbots, AI driven inspiration and AI Search Capabilities. As a Senior ML Engineer, you will collaborate with (AI) Solution Architects, Data Scientists, and data engineers to enhance our product vector databases and enable an AI-driven search that can match a customer and their intent with the perfect holiday.

Become part of our team - applications open! This role will be advertised for a minimum of 14 days but could close anytime after this time so don't delay!

About Our Offer


Personal benefits: Attractive remuneration, bonus opportunity, exclusive travel perks & discounts, extensive health & wellbeing support, and more.
Flexible working: Work is something you do, not somewhere you go. We encourage a healthy work-life balance and offer hybrid or remote working models.
A career to shape: Opportunities to upskill, reskill and grow your career. Access the TUI Tech Learning Hub to level-up and reach your ambitions.
Expand your horizons: Participate in our tech communities and collaborate on global projects and teams.
Community: Get involved with incredible local charity and sustainability initiatives like the TUI Care Foundation and the Sustainable Tech Community.


About The Job


As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you will be part of a cross-functional team that enables AI engineering skills and capabilities across TUI Group, aligning with TUI’s AI strategy. Being an AI enthusiast with a strong DevSecOps mindset, you’ll collaborate with your team to deliver solutions that challenge the status quo, taking full responsibility for your AI solutions from design to operation. You diligently care about the quality of your work, including proper documentation and security aspects.
You will collaborate closely with our App, Web, and CRM teams to leverage AI and advanced analytics to better understand customer behavior, deliver personalized experiences, and support business growth. Your work will contribute to seamless, engaging customer interactions that drive satisfaction and bookings, ensuring customers feel understood and valued.
You can articulate your thoughts and ideas and take the initiative to translate them into outcomes, ensuring alignment with business and technical teams together with the domain’s teams and the Group Enabler teams, you will research, evaluate, and test new approaches, processes, and tools, helping teams use them effectively. You will participate in Communities of Practice and collaborate on shared initiatives to grow your experience. You are eager to learn and grow in your role, welcoming support and coaching from senior colleagues.
You thrive in an international, multi-cultural team, constructively challenging and holding high expectations for yourself and others.
You consistently drive for technical excellence, ownership, and self-organization at both team and personal levels. You are passionate about learning, acquiring new skills, and staying up-to-date with the latest developments in your focus areas.
Security is part of everyone’s job. At TUI, we practise secure behaviours first in everything we do.


About You


Experienced with GenAI (ideally AWS Bedrock) for intent recognition and building multi-agent solutions that connect customers to our products using natural language
Built vector stores and graphs in collaboration with data scientists to leverage information to find products based on natural language (e.g. using OpenSearch)
Experience in designing, implementing, deploying and using various AI models and algorithms
Experience in deploying AI solutions (e.g. CI/CD pipeline, API development, containers)
Strong programming skills in Python
Understanding of machine learning/AI frameworks and libraries
Hands-on experience with cloud technologies and services (e.g., AWS)
Experience with SQL and/or Snowflake
Some experience with RAG and Graphs
Comfortable with LLM evaluation and testing frameworks.
Proficiency in data preprocessing and feature and/or prompt engineering
Customer-focused engineer with a passion for crafting high-quality digital products, continuous improvement, and effective team collaboration
Strong problem-solving and communication skills, with an understanding of the social, legal, and ethical impact of AI technologies.


From a workplace to a place to belong. At TUI we embrace diversity, equity, and inclusion, encouraging everyone to come as you are, because together, our potential is limitless.

We are committed to supporting candidates with disabilities and impairments so if you require any support, please do let us know.

Title: Investment Sector | Python Developer
Description:
At Devoteam, we believe that technology with strong human values can actively drive change for the better. Discover how Tech for People unlocks the future, creating a positive impact on the people and the world around us. We are a global leading player in Digital Transformation for leading organisations across EMEA, with a revenue of €1B. We believe in transforming technology to create value for our clients, partners and employees in a world where technology is developed for people. We are proud of the culture we have built together. We are proud of our people at the service of technology. We are proud of our diverse environment. Because we are #TechforPeople. Join our multidisciplinary team of Cloud experts, Designers, Business consultants, Security experts, Engineers, Developers and other extraordinary talents, spread across more than 20 EMEA countries. Become one of our +10.000 tech and business leaders on cloud, data and cyber security. Let’s fuse creativity with technology together and build innovative solutions that actively change things for the better.

Job Description


Develop and calculate indices using the Dataiku platform.
Write clean, maintainable, and robust code following best practices.
Assess project feasibility and technical complexity, ensuring high standards of code quality.
Design and implement optimized, scalable data processing workflows.
Conduct peer code reviews and ensure high-quality deliverables.
Collaborate with business teams to track progress and advance use cases.
Produce clear and comprehensive technical documentation, including code comments.
Monitor applications in production, continuously improving performance and reliability.
Ensure the successful development and computation of new index families over the next six months.



Qualifications


Strong experience in Python development (senior level).
Hands-on experience with Dataiku or similar data science/data engineering platforms.
Solid knowledge of data pipeline design and large-scale data processing.
Experience with software engineering best practices (clean code, testing, version control, code reviews).
Ability to translate business requirements into efficient technical solutions.
Experience working with production systems, including monitoring and performance optimization.
Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams.
Experience writing clear and structured technical documentation.



Additional Information

The Devoteam Group works for equal opportunities, promoting its employees based on merit and actively fights against all forms of discrimination. We are convinced that diversity contributes to the creativity, dynamism and excellence of our organization. All of our vacancies are open to people with disabilities.

Title: Software Engineer - Fullstack
Description:
Software Engineer - Fullstack

Blip is a leading tech company focused on software engineering solutions for sports entertainment.

We operate at scale. As part of Flutter Entertainment, we play an essential role in the Group's goal of becoming the global leader in online sports betting and iGaming, developing innovative products and platforms for over 14 million monthly customers worldwide.

We are serious about Tech. We are problem-solvers with big ambitions, keeping a people-first mindset at the core of our work. We prioritize flexibility as we strive to deliver the best technological products and tackle the greatest industry challenges.

Recognizing that everyone brings their own strengths, backgrounds and new perspectives, we empower you to be yourself. That uniqueness shapes the culture of belonging we are so proud of.

The Role

Our software engineers are passionate about building high-performance, scalable distributed systems. In this role you will spend most of your time on the back-end — designing and maintaining robust distributed services — while also contributing to the front-end (React/Next.js) to deliver features end-to-end, from the API to the interface.

The ideal professional combines strong back-end experience and solid distributed systems architecture knowledge with working front-end skills and is comfortable owning a feature across the full stack. If you are driven by technical challenges, have a passion for quality code and want to grow in a collaborative and innovative environment, we want to meet you.

What You’ll Be Doing


Implement and maintain complex, large-scale distributed applications, always aiming for continuous improvement
Provide rigorous and diligent support in code reviews, architectural decisions and the evaluation of appropriate technologies to solve specific problems
Develop and maintain front-end functionalities using React and Next.js, ensuring an efficient, scalable and high-performance user experience, with consistency between web and mobile
Collaborate with other teams and stakeholders in both intra-team and cross-functional projects, contributing to sprint planning and goal alignment
Investigate and resolve bugs, as well as help resolve incidents related to the systems and processes managed by the team
Create and maintain technical design documentation and other auxiliary documentation (e.g. runbooks) to keep track of decision-making and operational improvements
Contribute to the quality and technological innovation of the product and the work environment.


What You’ll Bring


5+ years of experience with back-end programming (e.g. Golang, C#)
Experience developing distributed systems and messaging (e.g. Kafka, SQS, Kinesis)
Good experience with SQL databases (e.g. MySQL, PostgreSQL), NoSQL (e.g. DynamoDB, Elasticsearch) and caching (e.g. Redis)
Experience with good software engineering practices, CI/CD, design patterns and automated testing
Working experience (2+ years) in front-end development with React and its ecosystem;
Knowledge of automated testing, mainly unit testing and ideally also visual and end-to-end testing
Experience with Git and GitHub
Ease of learning new technologies and adapting to change
Clear communication, collaborative teamwork, autonomy and proactivity in a dynamic environment
Experience with high volume data and access platforms (as a plus)
Experience with infrastructure (e.g. Kubernetes) and cloud (e.g. AWS) (as a plus)
Experience with observability and performance tools (e.g. Grafana, Prometheus) (as a plus)
Knowledge of containers and container orchestration (Docker and/or Kubernetes) (as a plus)
Experience with React Native, Expo and Next.js (as a plus)
Familiarity with the use of monolithic repositories and experience with GitHub Actions (as a plus).


This is what you should have. What do we have, you ask? Well...you can check our amazing perks & benefits right here! 

So ... are you in?

Equal opportunities

At Blip, we are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We strongly encourage people from all backgrounds, ways of thinking, and working to apply.

We are committed to including everyone regardless of their race, disability, age, gender identity, sexual orientation, and religion.

Everyone brings different perspectives and experiences; you don’t have to meet all the requirements listed to apply for this role.

Title: Freelance Agent Evaluation Engineer
Description:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency.

Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.

What This Opportunity Involves

We're building a dataset to evaluate AI coding agents - how well a model handles real-world developer tasks.

You'll create challenging tasks and evaluation criteria within realistic simulated environments:


Build realistic developer environments - a virtual company with codebase, infrastructure, and context (tickets, docs, conversations) that forms a believable development history
Design tasks from intermediate states of these environments - craft the prompt, define what "solved" means, and ensure the task is solvable by an AI agent
Write tests that verify agent solutions - accept all valid approaches and reject incorrect ones, neither too strict nor too lenient
Iterate on tasks and tests based on QA feedback - review agent solutions, analyze failures, and refine until the evaluation is fair and robust


What This Is NOT


Not data labeling
Not prompt engineering
Not writing code from scratch - the agent writes most of the code; you guide and evaluate


What We Look For


5+ years in software development
Core stack: Python (FastAPI), JavaScript/TypeScript (React), Docker, Postgres, Kafka, Redis
Experience writing tests (functional, integration)
English proficiency - B2+


Why this is hard

Frontier models are already good at coding. Creating a task that genuinely challenges the best models is non-trivial. You need to deeply understand where models fail and what scenarios reveal the difference between a good and a bad solution. Tasks have many valid solutions - writing tests that accept all correct solutions and reject incorrect ones is harder than it sounds.

How It Works

Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid

Effort estimate

Tasks for this project are estimated to take 20 hours to complete, depending on complexity. This is an estimate and not a schedule requirement; you choose when and how to work. Tasks must be submitted by the deadline and meet the listed acceptance criteria to be accepted.

Compensation

Up to $40/hr equivalent, depending on level and pace. Tasks are estimated at :20 hours each; you set your own schedule.

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer @JobCloud
Description:
Are you a passionate Senior ML Engineer eager to take on a new challenge that has the potential to revolutionize the European Job Ads Market? Then keep reading!

We are JobCloud, Switzerland nº 1 brand and experts in the job ads market, and we seek your expertise, ideas, and human skills to build our brand new software while cultivating our dearest value “Love what you do.” in our newly established company in Porto, Portugal.

A decade ago JobCloud conceived a concept ahead of its time - a product designed to efficiently manage and optimize the usage of the customer’s hiring budget while identifying the optimal channels to maximize the visibility of job ads (AI/ML are key to optimizing this process) and effectively reach the target public (potential employees).




Today our mission is to revolutionize the industry standard shifting away from the current job ads paradigm of Pay per Duration toward Pay per Performance. What was once merely a concept is now on the cusp of becoming a reality!




What do we need from you?

We're seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join our cross-departmental Data Science unit. In this high-impact role, you'll work across multiple teams and projects throughout the organization, leading the development and deployment of production ML systems that serve diverse business needs. As a senior member of our team, you'll be responsible for architecting scalable ML infrastructure, mentoring team members, and driving technical excellence as we transform data science prototypes into robust production services that deliver value across the enterprise.




What you will be doing

Partnering with Data Science to translate experimental models into scalable, production-grade ML systems
Designing and build high-performance, low-latency model-serving architectures and infrastructure
Defining and enforce best practices for ML productionization, including coding standards, testing, and deployment strategies
Leading cross-functional collaboration between Data Science, Engineering, and Operations as the primary technical interface
Defining and implementing model performance monitoring (e.g., drift detection, data quality, inference metrics) to ensure reliability in production
Driving innovation by evaluating new tools, frameworks, and methodologies, and promoting their adoption across the organization
Developing and maintain technical documentation, system designs, and operational runbooks.




What we are looking for

5+ years of experience in ML Engineering, MLOps, or closely related roles
Proven experience deploying and maintaining machine learning models in production at scale
Strong Python skills, including experience with data and ML ecosystems
Familiarity with LLMs, RAG, and emerging AI paradigms (e.g., agent-based systems)
Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS) for building and operating ML systems
Experience with containerization (Docker) and building production-ready services
Demonstrated ability to lead technical projects and make architectural decisions.




What we offer

Experience the best of both worlds with our flexible work arrangement (full remote or hybrid).
25 days of annual vacation leave plus 10 days of fully paid sick leave.
Fringes benefits: meal allowance, work-from-home allowance, gym allowance, private health insurance plan for yourself and 2 children.
1 day per month to tackle challenges inside the project, or test new ideas.
Tech training and human skills training and, budget for conferences.
Opportunity to travel and collaborate in our various office locations for workshops or team-building events.
A dynamic work environment that highly fosters a sense of fun while maintaining a productive atmosphere.
A competitive salary.




Our Hiring Process

Presentation of the project and company ~ 30 mins
Conversation with hiring manager ~ 1 hour
Technical challenge (at your best convenience)
Challenge presentation ~1h-1.5 hour
Offer.




About the company

As Switzerland’s leading digital hub, with almost 80% of all Swiss consumer internet traffic passing across our websites and apps, we provide our media and platforms with enabling technology solutions, to drive their businesses. We stand for interdisciplinary collaboration, innovation, and dynamic development.

We are on the move – and want to keep moving. We are farsighted. We are proactive. We are courageous. We are TX Group.

JobCloud is part of TX-Group and the leading digital company for the Swiss employment market, best known for the job portals jobs.ch and jobup.ch that connect thousands of candidates with the right job every day. Our team of 300+ employees at JobCloud is devoted to a common mission, finding the right job for the right person. Working from Zurich, Geneva, Vienna, Belgrade and Porto, every team member brings their unique expertise, culture, and vision to our team daily.

Seize this unique opportunity to enhance both the employer's and employee's experience in their pursuit of new career aspirations!

There are simply moments in your career when it's essential to embrace a new culture and broaden your horizons.




Come and check us out!

Title: Developer (M/F/D)
Description:
About us

Dorel Juvenile is the world's leading juvenile products company. Our products are available in more than 100 countries. We help families live carefree lives by providing them with juvenile products that rank highest in consumer reviews. That's what sets our products apart: durable, helpful, and caring.




Your Mission

We are looking for a Developer to design, develop, and enhance software solutions. The Developer will participate in the full software development lifecycle, including analysis, design, testing, and delivery.




Your Key Responsibilities

• Develop web applications using a variety of languages and technologies.

• Participate in code reviews and design sessions.

• Collaborate with team members to define and implement solutions.

• Participate in design- and architecture brainstorms.

• Support full-stack web development by applying agile methodologies for sprint planning, design sessions, development, testing, and deployment.




Your profile

• Degree in Information Systems or a Degree on Computer Engineering it´s required.

• Minimum of 3 years’ experience in similar positions.

• Fluent in English, write and spoken.

• Is eager to learn, asks questions and thinks along about issues or advice.

• Able to form own vision, from which he/she leads a process, a project, a policy issue or a department, and advises management.

• Able to take (political) interests into account and oversees the (long-term) consequences of advice and/or decisions for everyone involved.

• Experience with C#, MSSQL, HTML, CSS is a must




What we offer

A salary between 25.000€ and 32.000€ gross annual, based on your experience and knowledge, with room to grow.
This is a position for 40 hours per week.
You are eligible for 15 months every year.
The option is to work hybrid up to 3 days, with 2 joint office days.
The entitlement to annual leave can be up to 26 days, according to internal policy.
Other benefits include health insurance (covering the employee), bus and several partnerships, such as with gyms, clinics offering wellness services, banks, and more.




Are you ready to grow with us?

The people behind our products and brands make Dorel Juvenile an even stronger company. We are extending our leading market position and believe team spirit, personal drive, and accountability can make a real difference in achieving sustainable growth. This is essential for our future. We invite you to grow with us!

Do you want to be part of the growth of the next generation? Dorel needs your contribution! Send your resume in English.

Only the candidates with the pretended profile will be contacted in two weeks’ time.

Title: Doctorate Researcher
Description:
Research Opportunities

Biomedical Engineering




Work description

Investigate new solutions for cardiovascular signal processing, focusing on segmentation and classification of heart sound and electrocardiogram signals.
Design and implementation of artificial intelligence algorithms for analyzing data collected with a multimodal stethoscope.
Collaborate with clinical partners in collecting and organizing a database.
Collaborate in the writing of scientific articles, patent proposals and work reports.




Academic Qualifications

PhD.




Minimum profile required

Doctorates with post-doctoral experience or scientific curriculum after the PhD compatible with the category of junior researcher.




Preference factors

Participation, possibly including positions of responsibility in research and development projects in Biomedical Engineering.
Experience in phonocardiogram and electrocardiogram signal analysis.
Experience in deep learning for biomedical signal analysis; publications in the area of phonocardiogram signal processing.




Salary Level

In accordance with article 15 of the RJEC and article 2 of Regulatory Decree no. 11-A/2017, of 29 December, the gross monthly base remuneration to be awarded is based on remuneration level of the Investigador Júnior category of the Public Scientific Research Career Statute, with INESC TEC applying its own remuneration table for R&D doctoral employees, with a value of € 2461.50 for the equivalent category.




Application Period

Since 15 Jun 2026 to 26 Jun 2026




Centre

Biomedical Engineering Research




Scientific Advisor

Francesco Renna




What we offer

Multicultural and collaborative environment
A multicultural, international and collaborative environment that makes it easier to exchange ideas, work in networks and create synergies.
International projects
The possibility of working in international projects with some of the most important companies in the field.
Mentoring
Mentoring with the best researchers in the fields of electrical and industrial engineering, bioengineering, information technology and physics.
Self Improvement
The possibility of participating in international conferences, workshops, seminars and vocational training.
Other Benefits and Perks
Flexible working time, health insurance, discounts in hotels, transportation, etc.
Informal Events
Annual informal events, such as the multicultural party.

Title: Functional tester
Description:
At IRIUM we want you to always chase your dreams. Here, prepare yourself to conquer your goals, while enjoying the journey.

We are currently looking for: Functional tester.

Requirements:

Defining test scenarios and test cases by reviewing requirements

Executing a variety of test scenarios

Reporting results and taking actions based on outcomes

You’ll join a multidisciplinary team working in an agile environment to deliver top-quality solutions to customers. This role involves close collaboration with business consultants and developers.

Your Skills and Interests

An analytical mindset is key; you should know where to look for specific issues and have a detail-oriented approach to ensure thorough documentation for your colleagues.

What We’re Looking for in You:

A minimum of 3 years of experience in functional testing of software solutions

Proficiency in structured testing, test techniques, and test methodologies

Database knowledge, especially in Oracle and SQL Server; PostgreSQL is a plus

ERP, leasing, or mobility industry knowledge is a bonus (or we bring you up to speed through our extensive onboarding process)

ISTQB certification

Fluency in English

Location: Porto, Presencial

Range Salarial

Remuneração bruta anual: 35k - 40k - Brutos anuais / 2.000€ - 2.200€ líquido/mês

Nota: Inclui todas as componentes: Fixo, Variável, Subsídio de Alimentação, Teletrabalho e Benefícios.

What do we offer?

➡ An innovative and growing company, with a lot of opportunities for professional development.

➡ Retribution according to your experience and performance. Access to flexible pay and medical insurance as a social benefit.

➡ Unlimited access to technological training in free mode.

IRIUM is a company with dynamic and proactive professionals. Our values are responsibility and commitment to work quality. This is the spirit we are looking for at IRIUM, whatever your age is. If you recognize yourself in this, this is your company!

We can build the future together. Let’s talk!

Send your CV to: recrutamento@irium.pt

At IRIUM we defend a world without stereotypes or limitations and we believe in equality for all, principles that we subscribe to in our Equality Plan and Code of Ethics, guaranteeing equal treatment and opportunities regardless of any personal, physical or social condition.
